programme.title: Six Gun Mesa
programme.desc: After four of his men have been poisoned by Joe Lang ('Carl Mathews' )qv)), a member of a land-grabbing outlaw gang led secretly by town boss Carson (Leonard Penn), rancher Mark Jones (Steve Clark) beds his herd on Six Gun Mesa just outside of town. Lang stampedes the cattle and Jones and all of his cowhands are killed. Carson implicates and frames ranch foreman Dave Emmett (Riley Hill) for the crimes, and Dave's friends, Johnny Mack (Johnny Mack Brown) and Whiskey Evans (Milburn Morante), set out to prove his innocence.

Carson implicates and frames ranch foreman Dave Emmett (Riley Hill) for the crimes, and Dave's friends, Johnny Mack (Johnny Mack Brown) and Whiskey Evans (Milburn Morante), set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Capítulo 58
programme.desc: Mia confronts her father asking for the reason he never talks about her mother. Miguel and his mother argue; he reveals his plan to avenge his father's death against Franco.

programme.title: Capítulo 59
programme.desc: Franco sends Alma a message saying he won't be intimidated. Esteban destroys José Lujan's homework. Only the boys are allowed to be in the dance contest.

programme.title: Capítulo 60
programme.desc: Nico's dad is sick and in the hospital. The guys from the band decide to give Nico the money from their first singing gig to help. Miguel also asks Franco for a loan to help Nico and his family.

programme.title: Capítulo 61
programme.desc: Pascual wants Roberta to apologize to Hilda but Alma comes to put the teacher straight before it can happen. Roberta invites Teo and José Lujan to her house for Christmas.

programme.title: Capítulo 62
programme.desc: Mia doesn't want Miguel to have the check her father has given her to give to him. Roberta gets mad at Mia for thinking Miguel lied about Nico's dad.

programme.title: Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Roberta gets revenge on Mia by making Mia think he father died. Joaquín offers Tomás work running drugs. Mia and Roberta have a legitimate boxing match.

programme.title: Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Everyone thinks Mia and Roberta fought over Joaquín. Tomás doesn't want to run drugs but is threatened by Joaquín. Nico plans to quit school to take care of his family.

programme.title: Capítulo 65
programme.desc: Mia apologizes to Nico. Madariaga finds out that Joaquín is selling drugs in the school. Mia asks Alma for confirmation that Franco is dating his lawyer, Valeria.

programme.title: Capítulo 66
programme.desc: Carlos accuses Madariaga of taking bribes from León for Diego to pass his class. Nico says his goodbyes to Miguel and Teo. Celina shuns Mia.

programme.title: Capítulo 67
programme.desc: After he is taken to the principal's office for the rumor of drugs being sold in the school, Joaquín denies everything and puts the blames on Tomás. Roberta and Mia both don't want to spend New Year's with their parents. Their friends throw a beach party and the band performs.

programme.title: Los Casillas frente a frente
programme.desc: Pilar finds trouble. Victor and Aurelio make peace. Victor cleans his business. Aurelio offers Victor work. Paloma goes to Cancun. Monica sets up a meeting with Castrata. Aurelio challenges Monica over her partner. Aurelio is out for blood.

programme.title: Cita sangrienta
programme.desc: Aurelio tells the family of Monica's dealings. Swears revenge to Carmen. Omar denies Rivero's request. Victor enjoys BabyGirl and peace. Tata receives bad news. Victor's meeting with Tony proves fatal. Skinny and BabyGirl narrowly escape.

programme.title: El plan inesperado
programme.desc: Salazar and Colon are on a stakeout in Haiti. Felina remembers the men in her life. Ruti calls out Sebas coke usage. Tony hires Filemon. BabyGirl kills Ruben. Rodrigo helps Garcia escape. Pilar meets the distributor in Europe.

programme.title: El punto debil
programme.desc: Salvatierra's meet Rivero. Monica visits Isidro and talks finance with Rutila. Pastrana's Chicago trip doesn't go well and Colon is onto him. Skinny learns the location of 30-30s shipment to Monica. Victor takes Monica by surprise.

programme.title: El imperio de Casillas
programme.desc: Aurelio admits fault to Dalvio. As does Jorge to Esperanza. Zoe isn't fooled by Salazar. Victor foils Monica's drop and sabotages the Pastrana deal. Colon ask Rivero to bug Tata's IP address. Omar joins Jaime and asks him to seduce Paloma.

programme.title: Un remolino de poder
programme.desc: Colon questions Jorge. Monica needs to escape from Victor's imprisonment. Ruti rightly accuses her father. Pastrana targets Casillases and nabs Arelis. Penumbre strong-arms Super Javi unaware of his benefactor. Monica rips Victor's ethics.

programme.title: Plan sangriento
programme.desc: Pastrana arrives in Mexico. Felina and Pilar are busy in Spain. Aurelio is in Colombia to find 30-30. Someones looking for Eunice. Victor interrogates Ramon as does Tony with Arelis. Carmen asks Ismael about a loan for Nazareno.

programme.title: Casillas vs. Doble 30
programme.desc: Aurelio shows balls with 30-30 and gets product. Felina's en route to Antioquia. Tony's sicarios hit Nazareno. Ingeniero cautions Ismael of Tony. Tata seeks medical advice. Victor pleads forgiveness from Rutilla and Ms. Dona Alba.

programme.title: El escudo ante la guerra
programme.desc: Ismael calls his Dad with bad news. Felina deals with her ex Raimundo El Duro Cabrera. Tony teams with the Russians. The Club opens. Monica scraps with Baby Girl. Alba has Victor call Aurelio with a truce. Aurelio agrees to meet him.

programme.title: Siniestro en el antro
programme.desc: Aurelio meets Felina's ghost. Tony, Ruben and the Russians light up the Wolf Den. Monica escapes and frees Ramon but must now escape the fire. Omar invites Jaime to dinner so he can fulfill his promise. Esperanza says too much.

programme.title: El novio de Virginia
programme.desc: Silvia acude a un diplomado que dura dos días y quiere contratar a una niñera, pero Luis no está de acuerdo. Virginia le quiere declarar su amor a un chico y Germán piensa que es él.

programme.title: Bebé a bordo

programme.desc: Es el aniversario de Benito y de Liz, pero él no tiene dinero para festejarlo, por lo que ella le pone un ultimátum para continuar con su relación. Luis y Magda discuten porque ambos quieren usar las escaleras.

programme.title: Primera palabra

programme.title: El bautizo
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. ¿Quiénes serán sus padrinos? Además, ¿qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento? Benito abandona la vecindad por siempre.

programme.title: No se vende
programme.desc: La dueña del edificio falleció y sus dos hijas, 'Maty' y 'Mony' se lo disputan, dejando en medio a los vecinos y a punto de ser desalojados.

programme.title: Regresó Ale
programme.desc: Ale regresa a casa con su familia. Descubre cuál será su reacción al verla de nuevo. Además, Benito gana una audición para una serie.

programme.title: La cisterna y el charro negro
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque el agua de la cisterna sale muy sucia.

programme.title: Capitán raquetas
programme.desc: Luis está en problemas, ya que deberá armar un plan para evitar que lo echen de su trabajo. Además, doña Magda se actualiza en la moda y se pone uñas nuevas.

programme.title: Guerra de las albóndigas
programme.desc: Lorena y Liz se pelean para saber quién de las dos prepara las mejores albóndigas enchipotladas. Además, Roco recibe la visita de su madre.

programme.title: Cumple Magda
programme.desc: Los vecinos le preparan una fiesta sorpresa a 'Doña Magda' con todo y payaso y piñata. Liz y Lorena participan en un casting para Blancanieves.

programme.title: La visita
programme.desc: Hipólito recibe la visita de su hermano gemelo. Jorjáis emprende un negocio como repartidor de comida y taxi.

programme.title: La herencia de los Rivers
programme.desc: El papá de Lorena se aparece en el departamento de los Rivers para anunciar que heredará a su hija en vida y Germán tiene problemas con los interfones

programme.title: Vidrio roto
programme.desc: Los López Pérez colocan en su departamento un cristal que era para la ventana de Luis y Pedro necesita usar lentes.

programme.title: Las llaves de Angangueo
programme.desc: Los López Pérez reciben una invitación para el evento más importante de Angangueo y Vanesa debe recuperar un perro extraviado de la veterinaria.

programme.title: Seguridad ante todo
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Germán que ponga en el departamento protecciones de seguridad para Luisito Jr. y Rocko hace casting para formar una banda de rock.

programme.title: Cumplemes
programme.desc: Vanesa olvida el cumplememes de Fabián y sus amigos le ayudan a preparar una sorpresa. Un alumno de Silvia le confiesa que está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Tu nueva mamá
programme.desc: El padre de Lorena regresa con la noticia de que se casó con su enfermera. El Borre y Virginia sacan su app para vender tacos.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.
